title: STA
name: Priscilla Houghton
text:
I have recently booked in 2 staff to complete Under & Over 11M for their EWP.
Feedback from staff is that there wasn't basic training which included how to put on a safety harness. The one staff member was fairly young & was given guidance by his more experienced team mate.

It is concerning, that very basic but crucial training is overlooked.

They also mentioned that a lot of their time was taken up completing paperwork with their personal details. Perhaps the registration website could be updated to capture required personal details, ensuring that these are completed prior to course commencement.

Their feedback is that they would have preferred more hands-on training, which would prepare them & give them the confidence  to work on EWP's over 11m, rather that the high volume of paperwork they were completing to ensure that they would pass.

Some companies only let you operate for 15mins, but with sta, you get to hone your skills over hours/days. You’re under video surveillance, and also given a 2 way radio to communicate with the staff.
I would highly recommend this company.
